arg_error: DISP_E_PARAMNOTFOUND returns argerr; DISP_E_TYPEMISMATCH reports argerr plus one
bstr_cleanup: ctypes BSTR/EXCEPINFO ownership is managed by the declared structures
deferred_fill_in: not invoked by the inspected IDispatch.Invoke implementation
exception: DISP_E_EXCEPTION replaces details with description, source, help file, help context, and scode from EXCEPINFO
result_cleanup: VARIANT and DISPPARAMS destructors own post-call cleanup
